message:
fix(agent): emit lifecycle events when max tool iterations exceeded

Previously, hitting the max_tool_iterations limit returned an early error,
bypassing the normal TurnEnd and AgentEnd event dispatch. This left
extensions and event handlers unaware that the agent loop had terminated.

Changes:
- Construct stop_message with StopReason::Error and error_message set
- Emit TurnEnd event with session_id, turn_index, and message
- Emit AgentEnd event with session_id, messages, and error description
- Dispatch extension lifecycle events for both
- Return Ok(stop_message) instead of Err to maintain message chain

This ensures consistent event flow for all agent termination scenarios,
allowing extensions to clean up properly and providing accurate telemetry
even when the agent hits safety limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
